caption: Software Engineer. Open Source Maintainer. Human Developer
bio: I write code at Meta and maintain open source tools in my free time. I created Vest because form validation should not make you hate your life. I also built emoji-picker-react, which taught me more about open source than I ever expected to learn. Sometimes I speak at conferences about API design, performance, and the strange rules we follow without asking why.
